title: A conversation with Alex T. of Blackoath Entertainment (solo RPG)
body:
An in-depth discussion between Daniel (@Dungeondive) and Alex T (@Alex_blackoath) from Black Oath Entertainment. They delve into Alex’s game design journey, his inspirations, and the various games he has created. The conversation covers a range of topics, including Alex’s early influences like Tolkien and Michael Moorcock, his transition from board games to solo RPGs and skirmish games, and his approach to world-building and character progression in his games.

Blackoath Entertainment

Blackoath Entertainment

Key games discussed include “Disciples of Bone and Shadow,” “Seekers Beyond the Shroud,” “Sacrifice,” “Broken Shores,” “Rift Breakers,” and “Warlord Ascendant.” Each game is explored in detail, with Alex sharing insights into their development, gameplay mechanics, and thematic elements. The discussion also touches on the challenges of game design, the importance of player agency and customization, and the evolving landscape of solo and skirmish games.

Throughout the conversation, Alex emphasizes his love for dark fantasy, survival mechanics, and narrative-driven gameplay, as well as his commitment to creating games that offer players a rich, immersive experience. The video concludes with a brief mention of Alex’s upcoming projects and the release schedule for his latest game, “Ker Nethalas.”

https://blackoathgames.com/ker-nethalas-into-the-midnight-throne

This video is a must-watch for fans of solo RPGs, narrative skirmish games, and dark fantasy, offering valuable insights into the creative process behind some of the most unique and engaging games in the genre.
